human_similarity_alignment: Spearman correlation on held-out aggregated pair rows; not treated as fully independent external test.

human_similarity_alignment.note: This uses held-out pair rows from the aggregated THINGS odd-one-out data. It is useful for leakage control but not a fully independent human-similarity benchmark.
